nodes.label: Admin Data Table / Inventory Listing Panel
nodes.description: UI screenshot of an admin panel showing a multi-column data table with filtering controls at the top. Appears to be a listing or inventory management interface with tabular rows of records.

nodes.label: Empty / Blank Screen State
nodes.description: UI screenshot showing a mostly blank or empty content area — likely a loading state, empty data state, or placeholder panel with minimal visible UI elements.

nodes.label: Vehicle Inventory Dashboard with Car Listing Cards
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a web application dashboard displaying vehicle/car product cards with images. Appears to be an auto dealership or vehicle inventory management system with card-based layout showing car photos and listing details.

nodes.label: Vehicle Comparison or Listing Detail — Two Cars Side by Side
nodes.description: Photo or media content showing two dark-colored cars presented side by side in a front-facing view. Likely a vehicle listing detail page or comparison feature within an automotive application.

nodes.label: Vehicle Detail Page with Hero Image and Listing Info
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a product/vehicle detail page featuring a large hero image of a dark-colored car or SUV at the top, with listing details and specifications shown below. Part of an automotive inventory or dealership management system.

nodes.label: Sparse Data Table or Settings Form
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a minimal table or form layout with rows and columns containing sparse data. Could be a configuration settings grid, a simple data entry table, or an empty/partially-filled form within an admin interface.

nodes.label: WhatsApp CRM Conversation / Lead Status List
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a mobile or web interface showing a list of items with icons, labels, and colored status badges (purple, yellow, green). Likely a WhatsApp AI admin panel or CRM tool displaying conversations or lead pipeline statuses. Consistent with a WhatsApp-integrated sales or support platform.

nodes.label: Analytics or Reporting Data Grid
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a data grid or report table with multiple columns and rows of numeric/statistical data. Appears to be an analytics dashboard or reporting module with quantitative metrics displayed in tabular format.

nodes.label: CRM Lead or Contact Detail Form
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a text-heavy form or detail view with labeled input fields and a notes/description area. Likely a CRM contact detail page or lead detail form used for managing customer information within a sales or support platform.

nodes.label: API Configuration or Integration Settings Form
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a settings or configuration form with multiple labeled input fields, some highlighted in orange/amber indicating active or required fields. Likely an API integration settings page or webhook configuration panel within an admin interface.

edges.note: Both are tabular data views used for displaying records/metrics in an admin interface
Both are table-based UI components used for data display or entry
Vehicle inventory listing dashboard and its corresponding vehicle detail page — typical master-detail navigation pattern
Both relate to automotive vehicle inventory — listing dashboard and individual vehicle media
Vehicle detail page and side-by-side vehicle photo both represent vehicle listing media in the same automotive domain
WhatsApp CRM conversation list and CRM lead detail form are complementary views in the same CRM/lead management workflow
WhatsApp CRM conversation management requires API/integration configuration — these are operationally linked within the same application
Both are form-based admin UI screens within the same platform, likely a WhatsApp AI CRM application
Analytics/reporting module likely reports on the same leads and conversations managed in the CRM conversation list
Admin data table and WhatsApp CRM conversation list likely belong to the same application's admin backend
Empty screen may represent an empty state of the same admin data table panel — AMBIGUOUS due to lack of visible content

hyperedges.label: Automotive Vehicle Inventory UI Cluster
hyperedges.note: Three images all belong to an automotive vehicle inventory/dealership management system showing listing, detail, and media views

hyperedges.label: WhatsApp AI CRM Application UI Cluster
hyperedges.note: Five images likely all belong to the same WhatsApp AI platform covering conversations, leads, analytics, configuration, and admin data views
